title: Orange Syrup Cake with Cointreau Naartjies
excerpt: This cake runs like syrup. Once you start eating it, there's no stopping.

seo.title: Orange Syrup Cake with Cointreau Naartjies - Marinda Kook

html:
This cake runs like syrup. Once you start eating it, there's no stopping.

recipe.title: Orange Syrup Cake with Cointreau Naartjies
recipe.author: Marinda Engelbrecht

steps: Preheat the oven to 180C and spray a loose-bottomed pan with Spray and Cook.
Mix the flour, baking powder and salt in a bowl.
Whisk the eggs well in a bowl for about one minute.
Add the eggs and orange zest and whisk until pale yellow in colour, about 3 minutes.
While whisking, add the oil until well combined.
On a slower speed whisk in half of the flour mixture.
Lastly, whisk in the rest of the flour.
Pour into your pan and bake for 40-45 minutes

Poach the naartjies. In a small pot cook 30 ml sugar, 125 ml water, 125 ml Cointreau, 1 clove and 1 star anise until the sugar has dissolved. Take smaller naartjies and cut a cross on top of each one. Let them simmer in the syrup until just soft.
Drizzle with the poached naartjies and garnish with a mint leaf.
